E8 - Okra
programme.desc: It's the spectacular music duo, Okra, playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.

programme.title: E19 - Pizza Girls
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E16 - Army
programme.desc: Jack is the new dog at school and the newest recruit in Rusty's Army. Jack struggles with following instructions and always forgets his hat, but Rusty will make a soldier of him yet.

programme.title: E32 - Tradies
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E3 - Gloves
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.

programme.title: E40 - The Wedding Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: E51 - Ilulissat, Greenland
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch has travelled to Ilulissat in Greenland to show his teddy, Cuddles, the sights. But Cuddles ends up getting stuck in the snow!

programme.title: E38 - The Art Of Pink
programme.desc: The art gallery is holding a celebration of the colour pink and Sarah is keen to take part.

programme.title: E39 - Bug Bop
programme.desc: Bug and his friends lead Sarah & Duck to their outdoor music concert.

programme.title: E51 - Wonder Vole
programme.desc: Benjamin can't find his favourite toy, Wonder Vole anywhere. Stanley suggests they retrace his steps but have no luck. Maybe Wonder Vole Pyjamas will help Benjamin feel brave.

programme.title: E20 - It's Time To Go On Holiday
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are watering Cynthia's flowers while she's away on holiday. JoJo would like to go on holiday too, so JoJo and Gran Gran have a stay-at-home holiday in the park!

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E16 - Phones
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: E19 - Mysterious Milkshake
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: E9 - Leek
programme.desc: Leek won't let the conditions backstage stop him from singing 'Can't Hold Me Down'.

programme.desc: It's the spectacular music duo, Okra, playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.

E113 - Stuck On You / Pest Friend
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile try to help Roland find a best friend to take to an acorn show.

programme.title: E504 - Horsey Twinkle Toes
programme.desc: There is much excitement when Mr Zebra delivers a package from Aunt Dottie for Peppa and George.

programme.title: E205 - Crabby Wedding / The Cloud Kingdom
programme.desc: Dora's crab friends are getting married but Swiper swipes the ring and loses it in the ocean. Dora has to get the ring back! / Dora and Boots meet Vicky the Vicuna who is missing her magic flute that she needs to go back to the Cloud Kingdom.

programme.title: E108 - Bogweed
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai.

programme.title: E108 - Prizes
programme.desc: After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: E108 - The Crew Builds A Popcorn Cafe / The Crew Fixes A Slippery Mess
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew switch to cleanup mode when construction on Cafe Carl's new popcorn restaurant pops out of control. // A soapy accident causes slippery mayhem all over Builder Cove. Can the pups clean it up in time for Mayor Greatway's big jump?

programme.title: E109 - The Crew Builds A Drive-In Movie Theater / The Crew Finds A Rainbow Treasur
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: E305 - The Camper Van
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go on vacation in a special van. Peppa is surprised to find that at a push of a button the van converts into a mini-house for them to sleep in!

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc / Plant Sitter Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for 'later'.

programme.title: E604 - Sir Blaze And The Unicorn
programme.desc: Witness the return of Sir Blaze and Sir AJ as they embark on an epic quest to free a magical unicorn from an unpoppable bubble!

programme.title: E501 - Pups Save The Kitty Rescue Crew / Pups Save An Ostrich
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger makes fake emergencies for his kitties to save so they appear better then the PAW Patrol. // The Wingnuts get a new pet ostrich, but it gets lost on the trip home. The PAW Patrol must find and lead it to the Wingnuts' ranch.

programme.title: E203 - Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: E521 - The Pet Competition
programme.desc: Playgroup is having a pet competition and everyone has brought their pets. Dr Hamster is the judge, but it is so hard to choose the best pet...

programme.title: E10 - 收官大戲！皇后「強吻」眉姐姐斕曦
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E56
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E4 - 跨專業求職要克服哪些難點？
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E10 - 收官大戲！皇后「強吻」眉姐姐斕曦
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E3 - 新生的美好
programme.desc: 首檔流浪動物救助情感類真人show，邀請不同領域的嘉賓們成為動物福利中心的義工，照顧流浪動物，給予它們愛心救助、治療與陪伴，最終為它們找到合適的領養人。

programme.title: E49
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E4 - 跨專業求職要克服哪些難點？
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E224
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: E3 - Augrabies Falls
programme.desc: Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall. Derived from a word “oukurubes” which means “place of thunder” in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.

programme.title: E2 - Iceland: Ice
programme.desc: Tour an island built by volcanoes, but sculpted by ice. About 1.5 million years ago, a sheet of ice descended from the north and covered the land. Today, massive glaciers continue to carve marine cliffs and cut down mountains.

programme.title: E3 - Praying for Rain
programme.desc: Trail Anastasia as her herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves, while Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs. Join wild dog Phoenix’s search for a new mate as the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: E4 - The Inside Story
programme.desc: Look behind the scenes and meet the innovative teams working to preserve and protect Kenya’s wildlife. Check out Save the Elephants’ radio-tracking-collar system, a drone that monitors wild dog packs, and a local team of Maasai cheetah trackers.

programme.title: E4 - Web of Life
programme.desc: A manmade lake in Minneriya National Park supports the largest concentration of elephants in Asia. Follow a young male who has reached a turning point toward adulthood. In the rainforest, jungles teem with a variety of bizarre species of insects.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E3 - Augrabies Falls
programme.desc: Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall. Derived from a word “oukurubes” which means “place of thunder” in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E3 - Augrabies Falls
programme.desc: Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall. Derived from a word “oukurubes” which means “place of thunder” in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.

programme.title: E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E3 - One Very Lost Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: E3 - Bay of Fundy
programme.desc: Step into the Bay of Fundy’s surging waters. Learn how this east coast ecosystem sustains an abundance of creatures, including hundreds of thousands of seabirds, the world’s fastest predator, and a complex web of invertebrates.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri

programme.title: E5 - From Cloud to Coast
programme.desc: Monsoon storms sweep over the tropical island of Sri Lanka, and water carried in with swirling mists hits the mountainous heartland, beginning a journey through the many changing faces of the island’s forests.

programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: E3 - Bay of Fundy
programme.desc: Step into the Bay of Fundy’s surging waters. Learn how this east coast ecosystem sustains an abundance of creatures, including hundreds of thousands of seabirds, the world’s fastest predator, and a complex web of invertebrates.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E3 - Augrabies Falls
programme.desc: Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall. Derived from a word “oukurubes” which means “place of thunder” in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.

programme.title: E5 - From Cloud to Coast
programme.desc: Monsoon storms sweep over the tropical island of Sri Lanka, and water carried in with swirling mists hits the mountainous heartland, beginning a journey through the many changing faces of the island’s forests.

programme.title: E2 - Iceland: Ice
programme.desc: Tour an island built by volcanoes, but sculpted by ice. About 1.5 million years ago, a sheet of ice descended from the north and covered the land. Today, massive glaciers continue to carve marine cliffs and cut down mountains.

programme.title: E6 - Bayou Meets Land
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E7 - Reptile Rampage
programme.desc: Billy wrestles abandoned crocs, snakes and lizards out of a suburban home, then teams up with trapper Mike to remove some prickly porcupine squatters from a cottage.

programme.title: E8 - I Smell a Rat Infestation
programme.desc: Billy comes to the rescue of an unseasoned farmhand whose herd of Ostrich are on the loose. Then Billy and Tim save some house flippers from a red-alert rat infestation.

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E5 - Ukraine
programme.desc: Back in Eastern Europe, Catfish and Rooftop start their visit Ukraine dropping into the country via skydive. The adventures only get crazier from there- from wrangling pigs and racing ostriches to testing out if their heads can survive a Spetsnaz bottle break. After testing out the bottle break the duo move onto sambo, a Soviet style of wrestling and equally challenging event. The BMX bikers become the first people to trick at Chernobyl (and get a lifetime ban), but before they head out to their next stop, the two finish their trip just like they came in- airborne. Only this time they’re leaving by fighter jet.

programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E6 - Bayou Meets Land
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: E5 - Ukraine
programme.desc: Back in Eastern Europe, Catfish and Rooftop start their visit Ukraine dropping into the country via skydive. The adventures only get crazier from there- from wrangling pigs and racing ostriches to testing out if their heads can survive a Spetsnaz bottle break. After testing out the bottle break the duo move onto sambo, a Soviet style of wrestling and equally challenging event. The BMX bikers become the first people to trick at Chernobyl (and get a lifetime ban), but before they head out to their next stop, the two finish their trip just like they came in- airborne. Only this time they’re leaving by fighter jet.

programme.title: E7 - Reptile Rampage
programme.desc: Billy wrestles abandoned crocs, snakes and lizards out of a suburban home, then teams up with trapper Mike to remove some prickly porcupine squatters from a cottage.

programme.title: E8 - I Smell a Rat Infestation
programme.desc: Billy comes to the rescue of an unseasoned farmhand whose herd of Ostrich are on the loose. Then Billy and Tim save some house flippers from a red-alert rat infestation.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E107
programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: E10 - Nobody Talks
programme.desc: A late-night gaming party goes dangerously wrong when a young teenager disappears from the coastal town of Everett, WA.

programme.title: E3 - Nothing Personal
programme.desc: Andrea returns to the ward as an assistant to the trainees, who were terrified of him just a few weeks earlier. While he tries to win back his ex-wife, his collaboration with Giulia on a case proves to be challenging and full of surprises.

programme.title: E4 - A Good Thing That Hurts
programme.desc: The arrival of a special patient intensifies the competition between the interns. Meanwhile, Andrea involves the ward in the search for his email account password, which could help him reconstruct a key part of his past.

programme.title: E7 - Dark Mirror
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva return to Paris on a mission to spy on the double agents who are framing them.

Get the latest facts and expert opinions about the most essential stories happening around us and draw your own conclusions. The show is well known for its dynamics due to live debates with its various guests.

programme.title: E28 - The Feels
programme.desc: While Max and Gwen revel in the holiday spirit of Winter Wonderland, Ben couldn't be more unamused and focussed on the toys. The Weatherheads set their sights on Winter Wonderland.

programme.title: E8 - Pursuit Of Happiness
programme.desc: Will discovers the truth about his teammate's absence, making him question his future; Carlton spirals out of control.

programme.title: E24 - The Lollistops
programme.desc: In order to keep receiving the yummy lollistops he gets at the end of each dentist visit, Chowder destroys all of his teeth.

programme.title: E26 - Big Food
programme.desc: Chowder must find a way to bring monster Bigfood back into the spotlight.

programme.title: E27 - Paint The Town
programme.desc: When Chowder discovers an empty canvas dimension behind his bedroom, he paints his own fantastical world.

programme.title: E21 - Big Robot On Campus
programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.title: Jurassic Park Iii
programme.desc: Tricked into rescuing a boy from an island that once bred dinosaurs, a paleontologist discovers that its inhabitants are deadlier than he imagined.

programme.title: E28 - The Feels
programme.desc: While Max and Gwen revel in the holiday spirit of Winter Wonderland, Ben couldn't be more unamused and focussed on the toys. The Weatherheads set their sights on Winter Wonderland.

programme.title: E24 - The Lollistops
programme.desc: In order to keep receiving the yummy lollistops he gets at the end of each dentist visit, Chowder destroys all of his teeth.

programme.title: E26 - Big Food
programme.desc: Chowder must find a way to bring monster Bigfood back into the spotlight.

programme.title: E27 - Paint The Town
programme.desc: When Chowder discovers an empty canvas dimension behind his bedroom, he paints his own fantastical world.

programme.title: E8 - Pursuit Of Happiness
programme.desc: Will discovers the truth about his teammate's absence, making him question his future; Carlton spirals out of control.

programme.title: E21 - Big Robot On Campus
programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: E33 - Ben Again And Again
programme.desc: Billy Billions' efforts to carve his face onto Mount Rushmore with a laser are upset by Ben. The billionaire brat plots to remove Ben from the Omnitrix, accidentally opening a rift in space-time.

programme.title: E30 - The Garden
programme.desc: Chowder is known for slicing, dicing and constantly causing trouble in the kitchen. Hold on to your apron, you're in for some laughs!

programme.title: E33 - My Big Fat Stinky Wedding
programme.desc: Chowder visits Kimchi's home in the swamp.

programme.title: E23 - You Ain't Seen Nothin' Yet !
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: E9 - I Wish I Could Stop Hurting
programme.desc: Ruby sets off to settle a longstanding family feud.

programme.title: E9 - I Wish I Could Stop Hurting

programme.title: E21 - Big Robot On Campus
programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.title: Asian Tour 2026 The 45th GS Caltex Maekyung Open Golf Championship -Day 4
Asian Tour 2026 The 45th GS Caltex Maekyung Open Golf Championship -Day 4
Asian Tour 2026 The 45th GS Caltex Maekyung Open Golf Championship -Day 4
Asian Tour 2026 The 45th GS Caltex Maekyung Open Golf Championship -Day 4
Challenges
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are halfway through their time at Vet School. And the animal care challenges keep coming. Will and Saira are facing a massive challenge as they try to figure out what is wrong with Caspar, the Boxer dog.

programme.title: Can I Have Superhero Vision?
programme.desc: X-Rays are a type of electromagnetic radiation. They were discovered in 1895 by Wilhelm Roentgen and helped medicine make a great leap forward. When we look at an X-Ray image we can see shadows of the objects the x-ray passes through, like superheroes.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Attacking Castles
programme.desc: For ‘noble knight' Sir Howler, taking Lord Roach's fortress by storm is a real conundrum! But our formidable war leader's inventiveness comes in very useful! All the attack techniques in the book are deployed to invade his most loyal enemy's abode.

programme.title: Day of the Dragon
programme.desc: Ricky orders a takeaway, but will his fortune cookies' predictions come true? After making a dragon bike basket and using a pizza box as a canvas, Gavin arrives with a map to the Great Wall of Bristol to animate a monster of a picture.

programme.title: Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Alim finds Zoe and Milo in a messy pancake-making scene. They laugh when asked if school teaches cleaning. Alim takes them to Japan, where Akiko shows that students not only study but also take turns cleaning and helping in the canteen.

programme.title: Childhood
programme.desc: Children of noble stock receive an education in a castle environment while peasant offspring spend their youth working in the fields or at home. Daily life is busy, from a very young age. But kids never forget to have fun and goof around or playing pranks on each other.

programme.title: How do plants eat and drink?
programme.desc: How can we prove plants and flowers drink water? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of botany. Have hands-on fun by making a rainbow-coloured flower, and get to know J.C. Bose, an amazing polymath who pioneered studies into the nature of plants.

programme.title: Bouncing and Bending Light
programme.desc: What is the difference between reflection and refraction? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of light. Have hands-on fun by mixing oil and water, and get to know Zhang Heng, a great polymath, who figured out the Moon reflects light like a mirror.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Shrinking Rink
programme.desc: Addison's plans for a local version of the winter Olympics are in jeopardy unless she can figure out why their outdoor ice skating rink keeps mysteriously melting and running away.

programme.title: Treasure Story
programme.desc: While searching for treasure on the beach, Smorph imagines the story of how a brave submarine used a light-up shield to scare off a sub eating shark!

programme.title: Mystery of the Runaway Robots
programme.desc: Addison is stumped when she awakens one morning to discover that Eureka and Gyro have disappeared without explanation!

programme.title: Socks
programme.desc: Socks are not just to keep your feet warm! Hepi and Briko have some interesting sock-themed ideas.

programme.title: The Yoko Workout
programme.desc: The kids train for the upcoming Yoko Park Obstacle Course, and learn that there are many different ways to stay active and healthy!

programme.title: Accidentally Trapped
programme.desc: DiktaThor and Cleopatra ceasefire and combine forces to stop Sprinter. They put traps all over Hilltown, but everybody except Sprinter gets trapped. There is only one thing that the superhero can do - to set up the villains against each other.

programme.title: Mapping and Levels
programme.desc: How come we see the Earth as flat when we know it's round? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of geography. Have hands-on fun by making a carpenter's level, and get to know Kim Jeong-ho, a cartographer who created the first detailed map of Korea.

programme.title: Ebb and the Baby Seal
programme.desc: It's raining and a baby seal is splashing in a rock pool. Ebb joins in. But they get stranded on a sandbank with the water rising. Bird gets help. Ma and Flo come to the rescue and the seal pup's ma collects her baby. Things Couldn't be Wetter!

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Sound Circuits
programme.desc: Smorph has a parcel to deliver but when the doorbell doesn't work they discover that electrical circuits can be used to make sounds as well as light

programme.title: Danger! Albert Is Lose!
programme.desc: Albert must tutor Robbie-or lose his right to take exams. But Robbie won't listen and just plays video games. So Albert fights fire with fire, becoming the new class terror. As Albert turns into a mini-Robbie, things spiral-and now Robbie's the one who's worried!

programme.title: Alan Silva: Aerial Skills Artist
programme.desc: Alan Silva holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most 360-degree spins while hanging upside down from aerial straps in one minute. Alan Pixsley meets Alan Silva and learns about how to keep a pretty posture and look graceful during a performance.

programme.title: Who Owns Space?
programme.desc: Private companies are now making plans to venture into outer space to mine valuable resources from asteroids and the moon. But is it legal? Join host Emily Calandrelli as we look at the futuristic plans of these companies, and the recent laws giving them permission.

programme.title: Stories from Space
programme.desc: Four astronauts who have gone on missions into outer space share their perspective of life in micro-gravity. We meet Story Musgrave, the only astronaut to fly aboard all five space shuttles, and Anna Fisher, one of the first American females to go into space.

programme.title: Rock & Roll
programme.desc: Jesse, Julia and Ian receive criticism for their rock band and get tips on how to improve their style from rock star Andrew WK.

programme.title: The G.O.A.T (Roger Federer) and The Racer (Danica Patrick)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, tennis legend, French Open, and Grand Slam winner, Roger Federer, and the world's most successful woman in Indy car racing, Danica Patrick, share their stories on becoming the best in the world.

programme.title: The Word on Problem Solving
programme.desc: Say what?! This episode focuses on the importance of reading math problems very carefully in order to fully understand the problem at hand. Because if you don't answer the right question, how can the solution ever be right?

programme.title: Double Emergency
programme.desc: There's a double emergency at the Vet School. Edward, the ferret, is seriously ill, having stopped eating, and a sick cow with a mystery illness needs investigating. Can the Junior Vets cope when things go wrong?

programme.title: Mapping and Levels
programme.desc: How come we see the Earth as flat when we know it's round? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of geography. Have hands-on fun by making a carpenter's level, and get to know Kim Jeong-ho, a cartographer who created the first detailed map of Korea.

The Lion Roars
programme.desc: During Soong dynasty, there lived a beauty named Moth Liu. She has gone to blind dates for many times. Still she cannot get married, until she meets a talented poet Seasonal Chan. Seasonal is making his debut as Soo's special guest in a reading-concert, his avant-garde style is badly received, only Moth supports him whole heatedly. Not long afterwards the two get married, and only until then Seasonal realizes that he has married to a roaring lion who limits him on all his activities and expenses...

programme.title: The Dead And The Deadly
programme.desc: Fatboy is a helper to Grand Uncle who is the town's high priest. They are now found in the ancestral shrine of the Mas working wonders. Fatboy is also being reprimanded by Grand Uncle for being rude to his fiancee, Yuen. The last of the Mas, the rich family in town, is back but Ma Lucho is coming home dead. Accompanying the body is a woman who claims to be Ma's wife and very much pregnant. But Fatboy knows his boyhood friend Ma couldn't be a husband because he was impotent...

programme.title: Seven Years Itch
programme.desc: Living together for 7 years, Raymond has been faithful to Sylvia. But he is eager to having an affair after being teased by his colleagues. On his business trip to Singapore, he is being used by a charming girl, Siu Hung to smuggle some stolen jewelry. Raymond mistakes for love luck yet he fails to have an affair with Siu Hung before she sneaks away with the jewelry. When he returns home, a diamond ring is found in his luggage and Sylvia takes it as her birthday present. Raymond is so involved with Siu Hung that he decides to take Sylvia on a trip to Singapore to bring back the memory. He requests Sylvia to act if they were first met, but it comes an intruder Money who falls in love with Sylvia at first sight...

programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E49
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. Through the micro recording approach and small entry points in character stories, the program showcases stories of trailblazing exploration and pioneering efforts in Shenzhen, reflecting the major theme of China's high-quality development.

programme.title: Reveal Time
programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. Through detailed data collection and interpretation of strict logic and reasoning, with the audience close to the truth behind the events, it prys into the mysteries of the magical world.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.desc: Fun and learning for pre-schoolers

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Twilight Online
programme.desc: In 2003, a collision between a double-decker bus and a truck in Tuen Mun took the lives of 21 people. Ten years after the accident, several tenants on the Yau Oi Estate, which is located near the scene of the collision, report witnessing a woman clad in red jumping to her death on multiple nights, prompting veteran police officer Gu to go investigate with rookie cop Bee At the same time, radio DJ Poon Siu Chung returns to the site of the Tuen Mun collision with a group of students hoping to investigate the circumstances of the crash. When strange things start happening to the students, Gu and Bee are called to help. The two seemingly unconnected investigations converge as Gu realizes the incidents are connected.

programme.title: Reign of Assassins
programme.desc: In 428AD, Bodhi, Prince of Southern India, becomes a Buddhist monk and sets off for China, earning a hallowed reputation as a mystical martial artist. Following his death, his remains mysteriously disappear. It is rumored that his remains contain the secret to obtaining limitless power and ruling the martial arts world. Centuries later, The Dark Stone emerges as a team of deadly assassins; their best assassin is the ruthless, invincible Drizzle. On her latest mission, Drizzle takes out Zhang Haiduan, a high-ranking court official. Zhang's son, Renfeng, while mourning his father's death, is also attacked and seemingly killed by Drizzle and her fellow assassins. Drizzle's life changes when she kills Lu Zhu, a monk with whom she has unintentionally fallen in love...

programme.title: The Lady Improper
programme.desc: Born in a culinary family, Siu Man has always led an ideal life - Good grades, a financially viable job and a loving husband. But one thing has always plagued her: A fear of intimacy. After the end of her sexless marriage and several life crises, Siu Man reboots her life by taking over her father's restaurant. She hires Jiahao, a ‘culinary philosopher' who takes a creative approach to cooking. To help save the restaurant, Jiahao decides to mentor Siu Man, opening her up to his culinary world. In the process, Siu Man becomes attracted to his masculinity, intelligence and his mastery of culinary skills. After seeing her usually conservative friends let loose at a wedding party, Siu Man realizes that it's time to tackle her fear of intimacy head-on. With the help of a new friend, Siu Man embarks on a journey of liberation, starting with pole dancing lessons and returning to the dating scene. When she secretly spies on Jiahao's wild tryst with another woman, Siu Man finally exper

programme.title: Christmas Rose
programme.desc: Tim is a defence attorney with a heart of gold. Refusing to be simply a hired gun for his clients, he quits his high-powered job to become a prosecutor for the Justice Department. With the support of fiancee Megan and cop buddy Nam, Tim decides to start afresh. When he meets a handicapped piano teacher, Jing, who urges him to help her. She is accusing her doctor, Zhou a renowned surgeon of sexual harassment during a routine check-up. But with no witnesses and only their own conflicting testimonies, a Rashomon-like mystery unfolds. To make matters worse, Zhou's defence attorney, Freddy, is Tim's successor at his old law firm, and proves to be Tim's toughest opponent to-date. As a media frenzy encircles the case, it slowly destroys the lives of everyone involved.

programme.title: Nocturnal
programme.desc: One day, the dead body of Min-tae only brother Seok-tae was found, and Seok-tae ‘s wife Moon-young has disappeared. While searching for clues on this brother's death, Min-tae found that a novelist Ho-ryung also following the same trail and he discovered that the death of his brother was predicted in Ho-ryung's bestselling novel, ‘Nocturnal.' Min-tae was thrown into confusion and brother's gang and police also getting involved in the case. To find out the truth behind brother's death, Min-tae began a relentless and furious pursuit...

programme.desc: Duff Goldman is baking against six super-cake makers simultaneously in his biggest, boldest competition, and he's doing it all in five days.

programme.title: Happy Hardy And Heer
programme.desc: Happy follows Heer to London, hoping to win her love. But things get complicated when Heer falls for Hardy, leaving Happy heartbroken and caught in a romantic mess. Release Year: 2020 Awards: 2021 Nominee Film Award - Best Actor in a Leading Role - Himesh Reshammiya

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: Last Breath

E1 - Twinkle's Music
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E7 - Twinkle's Baby Sleep Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Join Kii & Yii for songs about feeling good & staying safe! First, learn the best way to get a healthy smile in a fun & educational song about how to brush your teeth properly. Then, learn how to be safe when you're riding a bike at the playground. The lessons continue as Kii & Yii sing about being kind to each other, especially when a friend is sick. From learning colors to singing a soothing lullaby, these songs will make you feel good!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Sings & Dances to Classic Rhymes!
programme.desc: It's a dance party featuring all your favorite classic rhymes! Join JJ, Bella & Cece as they dance to 'Hey Diddle Diddle' while the cow jumps over the moon. The fun continues as they help their friend Humpty Dumpty get home after a great fall with the help of some sea creature friends! Then, get ready to rock out with a band of monkeys in a brand-new version of 'Rockabye Baby.' From 'Five Little Speckled Frogs' to 'Looby Loo,' it's a dance party full of classic fun!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Join Kii & Yii for songs about feeling good & staying safe! First, learn the best way to get a healthy smile in a fun & educational song about how to brush your teeth properly. Then, learn how to be safe when you're riding a bike at the playground. The lessons continue as Kii & Yii sing about being kind to each other, especially when a friend is sick. From learning colors to singing a soothing lullaby, these songs will make you feel good!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Sings & Dances to Classic Rhymes!
programme.desc: It's a dance party featuring all your favorite classic rhymes! Join JJ, Bella & Cece as they dance to 'Hey Diddle Diddle' while the cow jumps over the moon. The fun continues as they help their friend Humpty Dumpty get home after a great fall with the help of some sea creature friends! Then, get ready to rock out with a band of monkeys in a brand-new version of 'Rockabye Baby.' From 'Five Little Speckled Frogs' to 'Looby Loo,' it's a dance party full of classic fun!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.desc: Former friends Xavier and Yuva meet again in college as adversaries when their respective cohorts come to blows during their annual cultural festival.

programme.title: E25 - Weekend In Luxembourg
programme.desc: Luxembourg, a little-known, authentic and inspiring country. At the heart of this rediscovery lie majestic forests, secret valleys, picturesque villages and a vibrant culture driven by an engaged, innovative population proud of its roots. Not to mention the discreet but central role of the Grand Ducal family.

programme.title: E25 - Weekend In Luxembourg
programme.desc: Luxembourg, a little-known, authentic and inspiring country. At the heart of this rediscovery lie majestic forests, secret valleys, picturesque villages and a vibrant culture driven by an engaged, innovative population proud of its roots. Not to mention the discreet but central role of the Grand Ducal family.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。
